title: Redaction Fixture Review
description: Create or inspect synthetic fixtures that prove PII/PHI/PCI is absent from operational sinks.
body: Inputs: loggers, serializers, support bundle builders, analytics emitters, prompt assemblers, and test fixtures. Use when validating redaction. Do not use real personal data as fixture content. Procedure: build synthetic nested payloads, run the narrow output path, assert raw sensitive fields are absent, and keep non-identifying correlation IDs. Output: fixture list, command evidence, and remaining sink gaps. Validation signals include snapshots or explicit negative assertions.
